description: Use this API to return an array of complex values for subsystem substation switching devices. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, xarray = astaswdevcplx(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem substations to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the substation switching device quantities desired For the following, values are returned in MW and Mvar For the following, values are returned in units determined by the power option setting . (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: xarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

string.description: abs(P+jQ) at the from node end (in MW and Mvar).
abs(P+jQ) at the from node end (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of XARRAY, is not large enough.
